description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linux that runs on push and pull request events to the master branch. The workflow has three jobs: build, test, and release. The build job checks out the code, sets up build variables, installs Qt and dependencies, configures kColorPicker and kImageAnnotator, builds the project, and uploads the build package as an artifact. The test job downloads the build package, unpacks it, and runs tests. The release job creates an automatic release with a prerelease tag.
